events.title: Kayak & Canoe Rental at Bill Sadowski Park
events.description: Escape the hustle and bustle of the city and experience the natural beauty of Miami like never before! Kayak along the scenic C-100 canal and explore the breathtaking Coral Reef Park. With our affordable rental fees, you can enjoy the serenity of the water at your leisure. events.description: ​Celebrate Independence Day with summer fun for the whole family! Enjoy crafts, scavenger hunts, guided tours, festive photo backdrops, and a splash zone to cool off. Reduced admission: $5 adults (12+) | $3 kids (11 & under) | under 5 & members free.
